debug_info.goal:
case inr
Hist : History
L R : List Formula
nlf : NegLoadFormula
tab : Tableau Hist (L, R, some (Sum.inr nlf))
s : PathIn tab.flip
s_in :
  s ∈
    if (Sequent.flip (L, R, some (Sum.inr nlf))).isLoaded = true then
      @exitsOf.match_2 (List.map Sequent.flip Hist) (Sequent.flip (L, R, some (Sum.inr nlf)))
        (fun tab => List (PathIn tab)) tab.flip (fun lpr => [])
        (fun nrep nbas lt next =>
          List.flatMap
            (fun x =>
              @exitsOf.match_1 (Sequent.flip (L, R, some (Sum.inr nlf))) lt
                (fun x => List (PathIn (Tableau.loc nrep nbas lt next))) x fun Y Y_in =>
                List.map (PathIn.loc Y_in)
                  (exitsOf (Sequent.flip (L, R, some (Sum.inr nlf)) :: List.map Sequent.flip Hist) Y (next Y Y_in)))
            (endNodesOf lt).attach)
        fun Y nrep bas r next =>
        List.map PathIn.pdl (exitsOf (Sequent.flip (L, R, some (Sum.inr nlf)) :: List.map Sequent.flip Hist) Y next)
    else [PathIn.nil]
⊢ ⋯ ▸ s.flip ∈
    if Sequent.isLoaded (L, R, some (Sum.inr nlf)) = true then
      @exitsOf.match_2 Hist (L, R, some (Sum.inr nlf)) (fun tab => List (PathIn tab)) tab (fun lpr => [])
        (fun nrep nbas lt next =>
          List.flatMap
            (fun x =>
              @exitsOf.match_1 (L, R, some (Sum.inr nlf)) lt (fun x => List (PathIn (Tableau.loc nrep nbas lt next))) x
                fun Y Y_in => List.map (PathIn.loc Y_in) (exitsOf ((L, R, some (Sum.inr nlf)) :: Hist) Y (next Y Y_in)))
            (endNodesOf lt).attach)
        fun Y nrep bas r next => List.map PathIn.pdl (exitsOf ((L, R, some (Sum.inr nlf)) :: Hist) Y next)
    else [PathIn.nil]

failed_attempts: simpa [Sequent.flip, Olf.flip] using (mem_existsOf_of_flip (tab := tab.flip) s s_in)

simpa using (by
      have := (mem_existsOf_of_flip (Hist := Hist) (L := L) (R := R) (lr_nlf := Sum.inl nlf)
        (tab := tab.flip) (s := s) (s_in := s_in))
      simpa using this)
simpa [Sequent.flip, Olf.flip] using s_in

simpa using (mem_existsOf_of_flip (Hist := Hist) (L := L) (R := R) (lr_nlf := Sum.inl nlf)
      (tab := tab) (s := s) (s_in := s_in))

simpa using (mem_existsOf_of_flip (tab := tab.flip.flip) (s := (PathIn_type_flip_flip ▸ s.flip)) (by
      simpa using s_in))

simpa [Sequent.flip, Olf.flip, Tableau.flip, exitsOf] using
      (mem_existsOf_of_flip (Hist := Hist) (L := R) (R := L) (lr_nlf := Sum.inl nlf) (tab := tab.flip)
        (s := s.flip) (s_in := (by simpa [PathIn.flip_flip] using s_in))
simpa [Sequent.flip, Olf.flip] using (mem_existsOf_of_flip (Hist := Hist) (L := L) (R := R) (lr_nlf := Sum.inl nlf) s s_in)
simpa [Sequent.flip, Olf.flip, exitsOf] using s_in

simpa [Sequent.flip, Olf.flip, Tableau.flip, exitsOf, Sequent.isLoaded] using
      (mem_existsOf_of_flip (Hist := Hist) (L := R) (R := L) (lr_nlf := Sum.inl nlf)
        (tab := tab.flip) (s := s) (s_in := s_in))
simpa [Sequent.flip, Olf.flip] using (mem_existsOf_of_flip (Hist := Hist) (L := L) (R := R) (lr_nlf := Sum.inl nlf) (tab := tab.flip) s s_in)

simpa using (mem_existsOf_of_flip (Hist := Hist) (L := L) (R := R) (lr_nlf := Sum.inl nlf)
      (tab := (tab.flip)) (s := s) (s_in := s_in))
simpa [Sequent.isLoaded, Sequent.flip, Olf.flip] using s_in

simpa using (mem_existsOf_of_flip (Hist := Hist) (L := R) (R := L) (lr_nlf := Sum.inl nlf)
      (tab := tab.flip) (s := s.flip) s_in)

simpa [Sequent.flip, Olf.flip, exitsOf] using (mem_existsOf_of_flip (Hist := Hist) (L := R) (R := L)
      (lr_nlf := Sum.inl nlf) (tab := tab.flip) (s := cast (by simp) s.flip) (by simpa using s_in))

simpa using mem_existsOf_of_flip (Hist := (Hist.map Sequent.flip)) (L := R) (R := L) (lr_nlf := Sum.inl nlf)
      (tab := tab.flip) (s := (PathIn_type_flip_flip ▸ s.flip)) (s_in := (by simpa using s_in))
simpa [Sequent.flip, Olf.flip] using (mem_existsOf_of_flip (tab := tab) s s_in)
simpa using (mem_existsOf_of_flip (tab := tab.flip) (s := s) s_in)
simpa [Sequent.flip, Olf.flip, exitsOf] using (s_in)
simpa [Sequent.isLoaded, Sequent.flip, Olf.flip, exitsOf] using s_in

simpa [Sequent.flip, Olf.flip] using (by
      classical
      have := (mem_existsOf_of_flip (tab := (tab.flip.flip)) (s := (PathIn_type_flip_flip ▸ s.flip)) ?_ )
      · simpa using this
      · simpa [Tableau.flip_flip] using s_in)
simpa [Sequent.flip, Olf.flip, Sequent.isLoaded] using s_in

simpa [Sequent.flip, Olf.flip, Tableau.flip, exitsOf] using
      (mem_existsOf_of_flip (tab := tab) (lr_nlf := Sum.inl nlf) s s_in)

simpa using (mem_existsOf_of_flip (Hist := Hist) (L := L) (R := R) (lr_nlf := (Sum.inl nlf))
      (tab := (tab.flip)) (s := (PathIn_type_flip_flip ▸ s.flip)) (s_in := by
        simpa using s_in))
simpa using (mem_existsOf_of_flip (Hist := Hist) (L := L) (R := R) (lr_nlf := Sum.inl nlf) (tab := tab) s s_in)
simpa using (mem_existsOf_of_flip (tab := tab := by rfl) s s_in)
simpa [Sequent.flip, Olf.flip, Tableau.flip] using (mem_existsOf_of_flip (Hist := Hist) (L := R) (R := L) (lr_nlf := Sum.inl nlf) s s_in)
simpa using (mem_existsOf_of_flip (Hist := Hist) (L := L) (R := R) (lr_nlf := Sum.inl nlf) (tab := tab) s s_in)

simpa using (mem_existsOf_of_flip (tab := tab.flip) (s := (PathIn_type_flip_flip ▸ s.flip))
      (by simpa using s_in))
exact this)

simpa using (mem_existsOf_of_flip (Hist := Hist) (L := R) (R := L) (lr_nlf := Sum.inl nlf)
      (tab := tab.flip) (s := s.flip) (s_in := s_in))
